meta.title: Personal Prosperity Planning™ | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.description: Personal financial planning in Woodland Hills, CA — retirement, family, risk management, tax-smart strategies, and wealth-building tailored to your unique goals by a fiduciary adviser.
meta.ogTitle: Personal Prosperity Planning™ | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.ogDescription: Your goals are unique, your plan should be too. Comprehensive financial planning tailored to your life.

hero.headline: Personal Prosperity Planning™
hero.body: At Prosperity Planning & Advisory, we believe true financial success is more than numbers, it's about creating a life aligned with your values, goals, and purpose. Our comprehensive financial planning process brings every part of your financial world together, investments, retirement, taxes, insurance, and estate strategy into one coordinated plan designed around you.
hero.detail: As a fiduciary, state-registered investment adviser, we act solely in your best interest. Every recommendation is personalized, transparent, and grounded in a clear understanding of where you are today and where you want to be tomorrow. Whether you're building wealth, preparing for retirement, or planning a lasting legacy, we help you make confident, informed decisions at every stage of life.
hero.tagline: Your goals are unique, your plan should be too. Let's build your roadmap to financial independence, step by step, with clarity, purpose, and peace of mind.

cta.text: Schedule Your Complimentary Financial Planning Review

serviceCards.title: Retirement Planning
serviceCards.body: You've worked hard to earn your freedom, now it's time to enjoy it. Our retirement planning process coordinates income, tax strategy, and risk management so you can retire with clarity, confidence, and peace of mind.

serviceCards.title: Family Financial Planning
serviceCards.tagline: Protecting your family's future, today and for generations ahead.
serviceCards.body: From education to estate planning, we help you provide for loved ones and preserve your legacy — so your values live on through every generation.

serviceCards.title: Personal Financial Planning
serviceCards.tagline: Strategies built around your life, not someone else's.
serviceCards.body: Your plan is personal. We help you build wealth, manage cash flow, and protect what matters most, bringing structure and clarity to every financial choice.

serviceCards.title: Risk Management Plans
serviceCards.tagline: Because life happens and preparation matters.
serviceCards.body: We assess your financial risks and recommend strategies to help protect your income, assets, and peace of mind from life's unexpected turns.

serviceCards.title: Tax-Smart Strategies
serviceCards.tagline: Keep more of what you earn, today and in retirement.
serviceCards.body: We help you make informed, tax-efficient decisions on investing, withdrawals, and income so more of your money works toward your goals, not away from them.

serviceCards.title: Wealth-Building Strategies
serviceCards.body: Through disciplined investing and smart planning, we help you grow your wealth with purpose, building a future that reflects your goals and values.

portal.heading: A Financial Plan Tailored for You
portal.body: Your life changes, your plan should too. Our financial plans are designed to grow with you: flexible, transparent, and always within reach. Through our secure Financial Planning Portal, you'll have real-time access to your financial world and the ability to make informed adjustments as life evolves. It's clarity, confidence, and control all in one place.
portal.accessBody: Your financial life doesn't stand still and neither should your plan. Our Financial Planning Portal gives you secure, on-demand access to your entire financial picture, empowering you to stay informed and in control every step of the way.

features.title: Review Your Plan
features.body: View your financial plan anytime, anywhere.

features.title: See Results To What-If Scenarios
features.body: Explore how major life changes, like buying a home, switching careers, or funding education — could impact your goals.

features.title: Run Goal Simulations
features.body: See how your plan performs under different assumptions and make confident, informed decisions.

features.title: Stay Connected
features.body: Communicate directly with your advisor, update goals, and collaborate in real time as your life evolves.
